/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/deadliner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/deadliner.dir/deadliner_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o deadliner  libdeadliner_core.a /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
